title: Cog's n Mon's
description:
Cog's n Mon's

What It Is:
A modpack combining engineering and Pokémon-inspired gameplay.

Designed for both relaxing multiplayer sessions and solo exploration.

What You Can Do:
Build intricate contraptions and automate tasks with gears and machinery.
body:
Welcome to Cog's n Mon's!
Explore, create, and relax with this unique modpack that blends engineering and creature-catching adventures. Perfect for chilling out with friends or solo exploration!

Key Features:
Build & Automate: Create amazing contraptions with the engineering-focused tools from the Create Mod.

Catch & Train: Discover, catch, and train Pokémon-inspired creatures with the Cobblemon Mod.

Adventure Together or Solo: Play with friends for fun multiplayer sessions or enjoy at your own pace.

Why Choose Cog's n Mon's?
Combines creativity with relaxing gameplay.

Ideal for both Pokémon fans and builders.

Endless opportunities for exploration and fun.
